geographic_restrictions: Global (with emphasis on urban centers worldwide)
project_area: Smart city innovations, urban living trends, data-driven infrastructure, sustainability, and citizen engagement
demographic_requirements: Projects must address digital divide and ensure inclusive benefits for all urban dwellers, with a focus on equity and citizen-centric design.
eligibility_summary: No specific eligibility criteria provided in the text. Likely open to municipalities, urban planning organizations, technology providers, and research institutions involved in smart city initiatives.
